goal: New Visual Context System primitive `<VisualContextGraphPanel>` that renders `planning-graph.json` inside the project-editor split viewport. Every node gets a cid derived from its id so the modal footer CRUD can target nodes. Integrates with the `scaffold-visual-context-surface` skill shipped earlier 2026-04-15. Depends on 42.2-43. Shipped: apps/planning-app/app/projects/edit/[id]/PlanningGraphPanel.tsx (native column-clustered SVG, type filters, search, click-to-focus 1-hop neighborhood, selected-node detail rail, deterministic data-cid per node via lib/planning-graph.ts nodeCid()), /api/dev/projects/[id]/planning-graph route (per-project graph.json + rebuild=1 hook), replaces the older GAD-only iframe in ProjectEditor canvas mode "graph". Lean: zero new deps (no react-flow/d3/dagre).
